body.docCnt: ##接口调用地址 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/customer/batch-add 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/customer/batch-add ## 接口描述 批量新增客户 接口所属功能路径： 智能费控 - 系统设置 - 档案设置 - 客户 接口调用注意事项： * 接口调用单次最大支持50条； * 接口不支持部分成功，单次接口调用全量成功/失败； ## 调用方式 METHOD: POST CONTENT-TYPE: application/json ## 接口输入参数 [{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}][{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"ARRAY","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerTypeId","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"CUS000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerStatus","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"%E2%80%9C1%E2%80%9D","desc":"%20*%201-%E5%90%AF%E7%94%A8%0A*%200-%E7%A6%81%E7%94%A8","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"availableOrgType","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"%E2%80%9C1%E2%80%9D","desc":"%20*%200-%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%0A*%201-%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E5%8F%AF%E7%94%A8%0A*%20%E4%B8%8D%E4%BC%A0%E9%BB%98%E8%AE%A4%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"availableOrgCodeList","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%20%22F000000%22%20%5D","desc":"%20%E5%A6%82%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BA%E2%80%9C1%E2%80%9D%E5%88%99%E6%AD%A4%E9%A1%B9%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"availableOrgCode","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22F000000%22","desc":""}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerCode","required":true,"label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"CUS00000000","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customerName","required":true,"label":"%E "exampleValue":"INFINITY_SELECT_103720543","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFieldValue","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%80%BC"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"customFieldName","label":"%E8%87%AA%E5%AE%9A%E4%B9%89%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"16"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"multiValues","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"id","required":false,"label":"%E5%A4%9A%E9%80%89%E5%80%BC%E7%9A%84key","exampleValue":"%E9%80%89%E9%A1%B92","desc":""}}],"open":true}],"open":true},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"applyAllUser","maxLength":"5","label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%201%EF%BC%8Ctrue%20%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%20%20false%20%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%0A2%EF%BC%8C%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%E5%B9%B6%E4%B8%94%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E4%BA%BA%E5%91%98%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%84%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%8D%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%8A%A5%E9%94%99%20%20%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%E4%B8%BA%E5%85%A8%E9%83%A8%EF%BC%8C%E4%B8%8D%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%84%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"customerGroups","maxLength":"","label":"%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%E7%9A%84%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"type","required":true,"maxLength":"8","label":"%E6%8C%87%E5%AE%9A%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"EMPLOYEE","desc":"%201%EF%BC%8C%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E5%88%86%E4%B8%BA%E5%85%AD%E7%A7%8D%20EMPLOYEE%20%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%20%20%20DEPARTMENT%20%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%20%20%20POST%20%E5%B2%97%E4%BD%8D%20%20JOB%20%E8%81%8C%E4%BD%8D%20%20ROLE%20%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2%20%20%20RANK%20%E8%81%8C%E7%BA%A7%0A2%EF%BC%8C%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%84%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%8D%E5%9C%A8%E5%85%AD%E7%A7%8D%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E8%8C%83%E5%9B%B4%E6%97%B6%EF%BC%8C%E6%8A%A5%E9%94%99%20%20%20%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%EF%BC%8C%E8%AF%B7%E6%A3%80%E6%9F%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"typeIdName","required":true,"maxLength":"100","label":"%E6%8C%87%E5%AE%9A%E5%AE%A2%E6%88%B7%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%9A%84%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"00210416","desc":"%20%E4%BC%A0%E5%80%BC%E4%B8%BA%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%9A%84%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E3%80%82eg%EF%BC%9A%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%88type%3A%20EMPLOYEE%EF%BC%89"}}]}]}][{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}] ## 接口输出参数 [{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}][{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"SUC0000","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","desc":""}}]}] ## 接口调用示例 ### 请求报文 ```json [ { "customerTypeId": "CUS000", "customerStatus": "1", "availableOrgType": "1", "availableOrgCodeList": [ "F000000" ], "customerCode": "CUS0000000", "customerName": "客户api测试", "unifiedCreditCode": "123456486785339896", "contactName": "一二三", "contactPhone": "16000000000", "email": "123@qq.com", "companyWebsite": "baidu.com", "companyAddress": "浙江省杭州市", "faxNumber": "123-456", "remark": "这是一个测试客户", "customFieldValues": [ { "customFieldCode": "INFINITY_SELECT_103720543", "multiValues": [ { "id": "选项2" } ] }, { "customFieldCode": "MULTI_INPUT_141705593", "customFieldValue": "多\n行\n文\n本" } ], "applyAllUser": false, "customerGroups": [ { "type": "EMPLOYEE", "typeIdName": "00010" }, { "type": "DEPARTMENT", "typeIdName": "00000002" }, { "type": "POST", "typeIdName": "P0004" }, { "type": "JOB", "typeIdName": "zc0001" }, { "type": "RANK", "typeIdName": "M2" }, { "type": "ROLE", "typeIdName": "S0002" } ] } ] ``` ### 响应报文 ```json { "returnCode": "SUC0000", "success": true, "message": "成功" } ``` ```json { "returnCode": "EROOR1", "success": false, "message": "已存在的编码或名称CUS1000请核对后重新导入" } ``` ## 错误码说明 | 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案| | --- | --- | --- | | SUC0000| 成功| 无| | EROOR1| 系统异常| 系统错误，联系管理员处理| | EROOR2| 业务执行错误| 业务执行错误按提示修改入参后重试|
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/customer/batch-add

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/customer/batch-add

接口描述

批量新增客户

接口所属功能路径： 智能费控 - 系统设置 - 档案设置 - 客户

接口调用注意事项：

  • 接口调用单次最大支持50条；
  • 接口不支持部分成功，单次接口调用全量成功/失败；

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息 解决方案
SUC0000 成功 无
EROOR1 系统异常 系统错误，联系管理员处理
EROOR2 业务执行错误 业务执行错误按提示修改入参后重试
